# neon_snapshot (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a Neon snapshot.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "neon_snapshot" "example" {
  project_id = "your-project-id"
  id         = "your-snapshot-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The snapshot ID.
- `project_id` (String) The Neon project ID.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The creation timestamp.
- `expires_at` (String) The time at which the snapshot will be automatically deleted.
- `lsn` (String) The Log Sequence Number (LSN) of the snapshot.
- `manual` (Boolean) Whether the snapshot was manually created.
- `name` (String) The snapshot name.
- `source_branch_id` (String) The ID of the branch the snapshot was created from.
- `timestamp` (String) The snapshot timestamp.
